name: OccupationClassifications
title: Occupation Classifications
description: All individual occupation codes (6-digit) from the Philippine Standard Occupational Classification (PSOC) 2012 with 2022 updates, published by the Philippine Statistics Authority (PSA).

concept.display: Member of the Barangay Council (Sangguniang Pambarangay)
Member of the Provincial Board (Sangguniang Panlalawigan)
Director general/Deputy director general/ Assistant director general
Governor/Deputy governor of the Bangko Sentral ng Pilipinas
President/Vice president of the Republic of the Philippines
MANUFACTURING, MINING, CONSTRUCTION, AND DISTRIBUTION MANAGERS
Oil and gas extraction production manager
Transport network vehicle service (TNVS) vehicle manager
INFORMATION AND COMMUNICATIONS TECHNOLOGY SERVICE MANAGERS
Insurance underwriting and claims branch manager
HOSPITALITY, RETAIL AND OTHER SERVICES MANAGERS
Industrial and production quality control engineer
Petroleum and natural gas chemical engineer
Petroleum and natural gas extraction engineer
Resident medical officer specializing in general practice
Resident medical officer in specialist training
Resident medical officer specializing in general practitioner - 2211
Specialist medical practitioner in public health - 2212
PRIMARY SCHOOL AND EARLY CHILDHOOD TEACHERS
SALES, MARKETING AND PUBLIC RELATIONS PROFESSIONALS
Medical and pharmaceutical products sales representative
Information and communications technology sales representative - 2434
Librarians, archivists and curators develop and maintain the collections of archives, libraries, museums, art galleries, and similar establishments.
Radio and television disc or video jockey
Electric vehicle supply equipment (EVSE) installation technician
Petroleum and natural gas extraction technician
Motor vehicle inspection system (MVIS) electric vehicle (EV) testing specialist
Chemical filtering and separating equipment operator

Chemical products plant and machine operators - 8131
Petroleum and natural gas refining blender operator
Petroleum and natural gas refining still operator
Chemical products plant and machine operators - 8131
Paper and pulp panel board operator
LIFE SCIENCE TECHNICIANS AND RELATED ASSOCIATE PROFESSIONALS
SHIP AND AIRCRAFT CONTROLLERS AND TECHNICIANS
Healer of indigenous people (e.g. Mansi-bok (Ibaloi); Mansip-ok  (Kankana-ey) in Cordilleras)
Electric vehicle (EV) fleet and depot safety officer
SALES AND PURCHASING AGENTS AND BROKERS
Information and communications technology sales professional - 2434
LEGAL, SOCIAL, CULTURAL AND RELATED PROFESSIONALS
Tribal Ritualists (e.g. Mambunong, Mumbaki, Mabaki, Mensapo and Anituwan in Cordilleras)
ARTISTIC, CULTURAL AND CULINARY ASSOCIATE PROFESSIONALS
Keyboard operators input and process text and data; and prepare, edit and generate documents for storage, processing, publication and transmission.
Entertainment and sporting events ticket issuing clerk - 5230
Entertainment and sporting event ticket issuing clerk
Sales and marketing call center agent
PERSONAL CARE WORKERS IN HEALTH SERVICES
Poultry breeder (other than chicken and duck)
Poultry farmer (other than chicken and duck)
Poultry tender (other than chicken and duck)

Aquarium fish farm operator (goldfish, corals, etc.)
SUBSISTENCE FARMERS, FISHERS, HUNTER AND GATHERERS
Stone cutting or processing machine operator - 8112
BUILDING FINISHERS AND RELATED TRADES WORKERS
Refrigeration and air-conditioning equipment insulation worker
PAINTERS, BUILDING STRUCTURE CLEANERS AND RELATED TRADES WORKERS
METAL, MACHINERY AND RELATED TRADES WORKERS
Cable and rope splicing machine operator -8189
Crane, hoist and related plant operators - 8343
BLACKSMITHS, TOOLMAKERS AND RELATED TRADES WORKERS
Metal working numerical control machine setter-operator
Motor vehicle engine and fuel systems service technician
Jewelry caster, by hand and machine
Jewelry finishers, by hand and machine
Electric vehicle (EV) fleet and depot safety officer - 3257
Electric vehicle supply equipment (EVSE) installation technician - 3113
Motor vehicle inspection system (MVIS) electric vehicle (EV) testing specialist - 3119
ELECTRONICS AND TELECOMMUNICATIONS INSTALLERS AND REPAIRERS
install, repair and maintain telecommunications equipment, data transmission equipment, cables, antennae and repair, fit and maintain computers.
FOOD PROCESSING, WOOD WORKING, GARMENT AND OTHER CRAFT AND RELATED TRADES WORKERS

tools and set-up, operate and tend wood processing and woodworking equipment, machines and machine tools.

RUBBER, PLASTIC AND PAPER PRODUCTS MACHINE OPERATORS
Envelope and paper bag production machine operator
TEXTILE, FUR AND LEATHER PRODUCTS MACHINE OPERATORS
Thread and yarn spinning machine operator
Thread and yarn twisting machine operator
Thread and yarn winding machine operator
WOOD PROCESSING AND PAPERMAKING PLANT OPERATORS
OTHER STATIONARY PLANT AND MACHINE OPERATORS
Cable and rope splicing machine operator
Car, van and motorcycle drivers drive and tend motor cycles, motorized tricycles, cars or vans to transport  passengers, materials or goods.
VEHICLE, WINDOW, LAUNDRY AND OTHER HAND CLEANING WORKERS
LABORERS IN MINING, CONSTRUCTION, MANUFACTURING AND TRANSPORT
Mining and construction laborers perform simple and routine manual tasks in mining, quarrying, civil engineering and building operations.
STREET AND RELATED SALES AND SERVICE WORKERS
REFUSE WORKERS AND OTHER ELEMENTARY WORKERS
